RecurringChargeAmount.description: The amount of the recurring charge.

RecurringChargeFrequency.description: The frequency of the recurring charge.

description: Represents an Amazon RDS Reserved DB Instance. Reserved DB Instances provide a discounted hourly rate compared to on-demand DB instance pricing.

CurrencyCode.description: The currency code for the reserved DB instance.

DBInstanceClass.description: The DB instance class for the reserved DB instance.

DBInstanceCount.description: The number of reserved DB instances.

Duration.description: The duration of the reservation in seconds.

FixedPrice.description: The fixed price charged for this reserved DB instance.

MultiAZ.description: Indicates whether the reservation applies to Multi-AZ deployments.

OfferingType.description: The offering type of this reserved DB instance.

ProductDescription.description: The description of the reserved DB instance.

RecurringCharges.description: The recurring price charged to run this reserved DB instance.

ReservedDBInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the reserved DB instance.

ReservedDBInstanceId.description: The unique identifier for the reservation.

State.description: The state of the reserved DB instance.

UsagePrice.description: The hourly price charged for this reserved DB instance.
